In [1]:
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns
from datasets import load_dataset
from wordcloud import WordCloud

dataset = load_dataset("ag_news", split='train')
df = pd.DataFrame(dataset)

labels = dataset.features['label'].names
df['category'] = df['label'].apply(lambda x: labels[x])

print(f"Dataset size: {len(df)} rows")
df.head()

Check balance and distribution¶

In [2]:
plt.figure(figsize=(10, 5))
sns.countplot(data=df, x='category', palette='viridis')
plt.show()

/tmp/ipykernel_9536/2878713765.py:2: FutureWarning: 

Passing `palette` without assigning `hue` is deprecated and will be removed in v0.14.0. Assign the `x` variable to `hue` and set `legend=False` for the same effect.

  sns.countplot(data=df, x='category', palette='viridis')
In [4]:
df['text_len'] = df['text'].apply(lambda x: len(x.split()))

plt.figure(figsize=(10, 5))
sns.histplot(df['text_len'], bins=50, kde=True, color='blue')
plt.title('Distribution of Article Length (Words)')
plt.xlabel('Number of Words')
plt.show()
In [5]:
print(f"Average length: {df['text_len'].mean():.1f} words")
print(f"95th percentile: {df['text_len'].quantile(0.95):.1f} words")

Average length: 37.8 words
95th percentile: 53.0 words

kinda sanity check¶

In [6]:
scitech_text = " ".join(df[df['category'] == 'Sci/Tech']['text'].tolist()[:500])
wordcloud = WordCloud(width=800, height=400, background_color='white').generate(scitech_text)

plt.figure(figsize=(15, 7))
plt.imshow(wordcloud, interpolation='bilinear')
plt.axis('off')
plt.title('Key terms in Sci/Tech Category')
plt.show()
In [7]:
business_text = " ".join(df[df['category'] == 'Business']['text'].tolist()[:500])
wordcloud = WordCloud(width=800, height=400, background_color='white', colormap='Reds').generate(business_text)

plt.figure(figsize=(15, 7))
plt.imshow(wordcloud, interpolation='bilinear')
plt.axis('off')
plt.title('Key terms in Business Category')
plt.show()
In [8]:
sports_text = " ".join(df[df['category'] == 'Sports']['text'].tolist()[:500])
wordcloud = WordCloud(width=800, height=400, background_color='white', colormap='Greens').generate(sports_text)

plt.figure(figsize=(15, 7))
plt.imshow(wordcloud, interpolation='bilinear')
plt.axis('off')
plt.title('Key terms in Sports Category')
plt.show()
In [9]:
world_text = " ".join(df[df['category'] == 'World']['text'].tolist()[:500])
wordcloud = WordCloud(width=800, height=400, background_color='white', colormap='Blues').generate(world_text)

plt.figure(figsize=(15, 7))
plt.imshow(wordcloud, interpolation='bilinear')
plt.axis('off')
plt.title('Key terms in World Category')
plt.show()
